title: Irish Flatbread with Peppery Cheese
description: A simple recipe for a delicious flatbread topped with peppery cheese, perfect for a light snack or appetizer.
instructions: Cut the flatbread into desired shapes or sizes.
Place the flatbread on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
Drizzle the olive oil over the flatbread.
Sprinkle the crumbled peppery cheese over the flatbread.
Season with freshly ground black pepper to taste.
Bake in the preheated oven for 10-12 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
